text.title: Test Pyramid Policy Enforcement Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Test Pyramid Policy Enforcement methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Every new e2e test in a module with shape=pyramid|hybrid REQUIRES a justification block in the PR description (≥2 sentences naming the integration risk and why a contract/integration test cannot cover it).
rule.rationale: Every new e2e test in a module with shape=pyramid|hybrid REQUIRES a justification block in the PR description (≥2 sentences naming the integration risk and why a contract/integration test cannot cover

rule.statement: Each module has an e2e_budget integer. PR that exceeds the budget triggers automatic review by the named owner.
rule.rationale: Each module has an e2e_budget integer. PR that exceeds the budget triggers automatic review by the named owner.

rule.statement: Record names a single owner accountable for policy decisions. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.
rule.rationale: Record names a single owner accountable for policy decisions. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.

rule.statement: Policy record carries next_review_date ≤90d from last_reviewed.
rule.rationale: Policy record carries next_review_date ≤90d from last_reviewed.

rule.statement: Repo PR template MUST contain an explicit 'New e2e tests added' checkbox + justification field. Without it the policy is unenforceable.
rule.rationale: Repo PR template MUST contain an explicit 'New e2e tests added' checkbox + justification field. Without it the policy is unenforceable.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-test-pyramid-policy-enforcement.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
